name: conv
description: Plugin-owned skills for the conversate conversation recorder: save, resume, list, park, sidekick, return, continue, and regen topic-bound records in the Conversation database.

interface.shortDescription: Save and resume distilled agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: conversate stores topic-bound conversations as distilled, resumable records in the Conversation database. Codex exposes the same conv verb inventory as the shipped skills: conv:save, conv:resume, conv:list, conv:park, conv:sidekick, conv:return, conv:continue, and conv:regen.
defaultPrompt: Run conv:resume on the auth discussion.
